name: My boss in Ogden is mad I filed a workers comp claim after hurting my hand, can they fire me?
description: No, retaliation is illegal in Utah with heavy fines.[1]

mainEntity.name: My boss in Ogden is mad I filed a workers comp claim after hurting my hand, can they fire me?

acceptedAnswer.text: No, retaliation is illegal in Utah with heavy fines.[1]
acceptedAnswer.description: No, Utah law prohibits retaliation like firing or harassment for filing a claim, with fines up to $5,000 for violations.[1] Employers cannot impede your benefits.[1] Key factors: Document any threats or changes in treatment; report to Labor Commission if needed.[1] Continue medical treatment and claim process without fear.[2] Protections ensure you receive entitled compensation.[1]
